name: Silverthorne Lumber Co. v. United States
summary: Established fruit of the poisonous tree doctrine; evidence derived from illegal search inadmissible even if independent source would have discovered it.
holding: Government cannot use evidence derived from illegal search, nor knowledge gained from such evidence to subpoena documents, as this would make Fourth Amendment meaningless.
relevance_to_audit: Critical for chain of custody analysis; evidence derived from tainted sources must be excluded. Relevant to PDF forensics and metadata integrity where evidence chain is questioned.
